notes: Full dinner menu + cocktails and wines-by-the-glass captured (antipasti, salads, pizze, calzone & pasta, dolci). Pizzas/calzone/gnocchi treated as entrees. '*' marks raw/undercooked egg, not a dietary tag. No vegetarian/GF marks published. Plain espresso/americano/macchiato/cappuccino omitted from beverages (coffee service, not pairing-relevant).

dishes.name: Castelvetrano Olives
dishes.description: Served warm with sea salt, garlic, and oregano.

dishes.name: Burrata di Campania
dishes.description: Fresh buffalo mozzarella filled with cream, roasted cherry tomatoes, extra virgin olive oil, Trapani sea salt (add rosemary flatbread +5).
